response.overview: # Translation  The story of Maya, a beautiful village girl who loves to sing but is shy. Maya has just moved to the city and meets Safidah, a boutique worker who belongs to her uncle, who also begins to transform Maya into an urban girl known as Lady Wawa. Her mother in the village, Cik Eton, wants to marry off her daughter to a businessman in their village. However, Maya refuses. The Lady Wawa persona and her lifestyle are kept hidden from her family's knowledge. Maya's life begins as she becomes a famous YouTube star until Azad becomes aware of her. Azad secretly likes Maya and he states that the popular Lady Wawa is an example of a dishonest person. Maya, who is disheartened because Lady Wawa is actually herself, withdraws and becomes sad. Will Azad discover the truth?
response.title: Gadis Kampung Paling Popular
